programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: 5 Star Getaways
programme.desc: This series is a sun-filled invitation to travel and visit magnificent all-inclusive 5-star resorts throughout the world, their magnificent surroundings and the exciting excursions one can do at each destination.

programme.title: Tasting America
programme.desc: A person tries food they wouldn't usually try, to see how they react to meals they wouldn't usually eat.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Hunters Adrian Knops and Garrett Hagen venture into a remote part of Alaska's Misty Fjord, hunting moose and bear; after a successful hunt, Adrian finds himself trapped by a twenty-foot tidal surge after Garrett fails to return with the skiff.

programme.title: Dream Cruises
programme.desc: The Western Mediterranean Sea.

programme.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programme.desc: Mack and Sofia head south to Miami with their two teenage sons; they both want to live near the water, which means a dock for a boat and yoga by the ocean.

programme.desc: Trade winds, wildlife and coral shores.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan digs around the Flanders exploring Western Europe's least understood region. He discovers how a Christmas cookie has turned into a spreading sensation and discovers a ghost town of automobiles with a mysterious past.

programme.desc: From above, this private island is the shape of a heart, so it's no wonder it's owners fell in love with it straight away, and you will too. Nestled quietly amongst the beautiful Australian wilderness, and yet just a stone's throw from civilization.

programme.desc: It's fast action and fine times as the In-Fisherman staff reveals a crazy rig for tough-time smallmouths; digging deep for pugnacious bluegills stagging for the spawn; heading down a historic road of discovery.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight-forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching platform for anyone to be successful in bass fishing.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland finds a huge bluegill and shellcracker bed on Lake Okeechobee, catching fish on small spinner jigs and light tackle, while the south flat canals yield exotic panfish on jigs and Scroungers.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Host and producer Mark Romanack shares his 30-plus years of professional fishing savvy with viewers.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Melissa travels the globe going head-to-head with various animals.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Jim tries to harvest the biggest moose of his career.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott Leysath heads west to The Big Island of Hawaii in search of feral cows and well-fed wild boar; he enlists the help of a popular chef to cook them.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Join Beau & Walker on an adventure they will never forget catching Specs & Bass out of Highland Park Fish Camp in DeLand, Florida.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: Musky Fishing on Lake of the Woods in Canada with Veterans at Myles Place Resort.

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. It is the heart of everything we do, a deep commitment to those who've sacrificed for our country. Our Purpose, Vision, and Mission guides our efforts to ensure every service-connected disabled Veteran has the stability, dignity, and opportunity they deserve.

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Combines the lives and dreams of Sparky, a retired professional firefighter and president of M2D Camo.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: In remote and rugged Kodiak Island, Alaska, bowhunter Mark Heck undertakes his fourth journey in pursuit of an Alaskan brown bear and comes toe to toe with a potential world-record archery brown bear at a mere 15 yards.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger and his daughter-in-law put an incredible stalk on a huge oryx bull in South Texas.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl

programme.title: Small Town Hunting

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original-an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken-his skills extend far beyond wild pigs. From giant whitetails in the Midwest to red stag in New Zealand.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E27 Lariat An old friend of Lucas returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E28 Smoke Screen Several men are vying for a rancher's daughter's affections; when she is found dead, one of them becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E29 Shotgun Man Shotgun man John Beaumont, who Lucas sent to prison, returns with vengeance on his mind.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S03 E06 Man Up The cowboys help a rancher remove dangerous cattle from his property; Booger begins to train Bubba's new colt; Chef Bill insists that the guys get more personal training prior to opening their restaurant; Cody helps Misty with her new cattle pens.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S03 E07 Horse of a Different Color Booger's horsemanship is challenged by a young polo player; Cody cleans up a favorite fishing hole for his ailing grandfather; Bubba and Kaley watch as Andie takes her first steps; the cowboys convince Chef Bill to back their pop-up restaurant.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E22 The Boarding House A woman whom Lucas remembers as a card cheat opens a boardinghouse in town.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E23 The Second Witness Lucas risks his life when he offers to appear as a witness in a murder trial.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S01 E01 Scourge of the West A fake American Indian attack is ordered to help Parmenter's image.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S01 E02 Don't Look Now, One of Our Cannon Is Missing O'Rourke loans the Hekawis a cannon for their moon festival, then can't get it back.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E08 The Many Faces of Charles Siringo Unable to apprehend the train-robbing Smith Brothers, Sheriff Doc Shores calls the Pinkerton National Detective Agency for assistance; the agency sends Charles Siringo, an undercover specialist known for his unorthodox methods of capturing criminals.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S03 E03 Bass Reeves Tracks Belle Starr U.S. Marshal Bass Reeves pursues fugitive Belle Starr, the Bandit Queen, after she flees town with her daughter and outlaw husband.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S02 E01 Kit Carson: Fearless Fighter While coming of age on America's frontier, Kit Carson sets a new standard for steely nerves and fearlessness; his legend is born when a Native woman is insulted by a notorious bully of the mountains, and Kit challenges the man to a duel to death.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S02 E18 The Talisman The riders help a priest defend his mission from marauding bandits; Buck protects Lottie from a mountain man.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S01 E23 The Seventh Hand Bret sets out to capture two thieves after an entire poker game is robbed.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S02 E13 Deadline Cheyenne helps an honest newspaper in a fight against a crooked man.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S02 E09 Breed of Violence A sheriff's daughter runs off with her boyfriend (John Ericson), unaware he is a murderous bank robber.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E30 Sins of the Father After shooting a man in self-defense, Andy Moon and his son turns to Lucas for protection from his vengeful brothers; they take shelter at the McCain ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E31 The Prodigal A bank-robbing gunman decides to hide out at the McCain ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E32 The Fourflusher A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race; he hopes to win enough money to buy a farm from the owner, who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E33 The Jailbird A convict is released from prison and returns home to North Fork.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S03 E06 Man Up The cowboys help a rancher remove dangerous cattle from his property; Booger begins to train Bubba's new colt; Chef Bill insists that the guys get more personal training prior to opening their restaurant; Cody helps Misty with her new cattle pens.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: (1946) Western romance starring Joel McCrea and Sonny Tufts as a couple of cowboys who compete for the affections of a new schoolteacher from out east, played by Barbara Britton.

programme.title: Crash Dive
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama starring Tyrone Power and Anne Baxter. An ambitious naval officer falls in love with a school teacher before leaving on a dangerous submarine mission.

programme.title: Jerry & Marge Go Large
programme.desc: (2022) Fact-based comedy starring Bryan Cranston and Annette Bening as a retired couple who find a way to exploit a lottery loophole. But then some rich kids try to muscle in...

programme.title: Stand by Me
programme.desc: (1986) Four young friends (Wil Wheaton, River Phoenix, Corey Feldman, Jerry O'Connell) set out on an expedition into deepest Oregon in this coming-of-age tale based on a Stephen King story.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: (2020) Fighty, satirical horror that upset Donald Trump. Hilary Swank plays a rich lefty who likes hunting working class people to the death. But she didn't reckon on Betty Gilpin.

programme.title: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: (2018) Drama with Amandla Stenberg, based on Angie Thomas's novel. A young Black woman's friend is shot dead after they are pulled over. Can she find the courage to take on the police?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: (2019) Greta Gerwig's Oscar-winning period drama adaptation of the classic Louisa May Alcott novel, starring Emma Watson, Saoirse Ronan, Florence Pugh, Timothée Chalamet and Meryl Streep.

programme.title: Animal Farm
programme.desc: (1954) George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

programme.title: Ride Lonesome
programme.desc: (1959) Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

programme.title: Enemy Mine
programme.desc: (1985) Sci-fi adventure starring Dennis Quaid and Louis Gossett Jr. A human and his alien enemy find themselves stranded alone on a hostile planet, where they must work together to survive.

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary...
programme.desc: ...Gentlemen: (2003) Fantasy with Sean Connery. In an alternative Victorian age, can Allan Quatermain, Dorian Gray, Captain Nemo, Mina Harker and the Invisible Man avert a war?

programme.title: How to Have Sex
programme.desc: (2023) Incisive coming-of-age drama with Mia McKenna-Bruce. Three teenage girls go on holiday looking for a taste of hedonism. But is the reality as simple or as fun as the dream?

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost...
programme.desc: ...Protocol: (2011) Part four of the Tom Cruise action-thriller franchise. The Impossible Missions Force fight to clear their name, while also trying to avert nuclear war. Busy, busy, busy!

programme.title: Old Boys
programme.desc: (2018) Charming comedy set in an all-boys school in the 80s. An awkward geek gets caught in a love triangle with a teacher's daughter and the school sports star.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Twelve O'Clock High
programme.desc: (1949) World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

programme.title: The Black Shield of Falworth

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: (1969) Civil War-era western starring John Wayne and Rock Hudson. Union and Confederate soldiers reluctantly join forces to fight against Mexican Emperor Maximillian's invasion.

programme.title: Le Mans '66

programme.title: Midnight Run
programme.desc: (1988) Action comedy. Robert De Niro stars as a bounty hunter transporting a criminal from New York to Los Angeles with the FBI and the mob hot on their tail. With Charles Grodin.

programme.title: Warlock

programme.desc: The ultimate high-speed test of rider and machine, competitors race for a minimum of 8 or as many as 24 hours at some of the world's most challenging circuits including Le Mans, Spa and Suzuka.

programme.title: Leader's Playbook
programme.desc: This episode of Leader's Playbook takes you inside YouTube the #1 video sharing platform in the world. In this candid interview with YouTube's CEO Neal Mohan, CNBC's Julia Boorstin explores the CEO's leadership playbook to reveal the strategies he uses to help drive two billion people a day to search, watch and create on the platform. programme.title: The Battle at Apache Pass
programme.desc: Indian leader Cochise (Jeff Chandler), whose wife (Susan Cabot) is pregnant, sides with a cavalry major (John Lund) against warring Geronimo.

programme.title: The Guns of Navarone
programme.desc: In 1943, a small commando team is sent to destroy huge German guns on the Greek Island of Navarone in order to rescue Allied troops trapped on Kheros. Led by British Major Franklin (Anthony Quayle), the team includes American Mallory (Gregory Peck), Greek resistance fighter Stavros (Anthony Quinn) and reluctant explosives expert Miller. Facing impossible odds, the men battle stormy seas and daunting cliffs. When Franklin is injured, Mallory takes command, and personal enmities spill over.

programme.title: They Were Expendable
programme.desc: After a demonstration of new PT boats, navy brass are still unconvinced of their viability in combat, leaving Lt. "Rusty" Ryan frustrated. After the attack on Pearl Harbor, however, Ryan and his buddy Lt. Brickley are told they can finally take their squadron into battle. The PT boats quickly prove their worth, successfully shooting down Japanese planes, relaying messages between islands, and picking off a multitude of enemy ships.

programme.title: The Story of Dr. Wassell
programme.desc: This film presents a dramatization of the wartime heroics of naval doctor Corydon M. Wassell (Gary Cooper), who is stationed in the East Indies during a Japanese attack on the USS Marblehead. After the less seriously wounded soldiers are evacuated to Australia, Wassell stays in Java to save those left behind. As the Japanese advance, he risks his life and defies orders in an attempt to rescue as many as possible. His actions are later recognized in a radio address given by President Roosevelt.

programme.title: The Nevadan
programme.desc: On his way to jail, bandit Tom Tanner (Forrest Tucker) escapes the law and is pursued by Andy Barclay (Randolph Scott), a federal marshal who believes that Tanner will lead him to a stash of stolen gold. Barclay changes horses at the ranch of Karen Galt (Dorothy Malone), planting the seeds of romance before following Tanner to a mine shaft where the stashed loot is hidden. But a gang of outlaws who also want the gold then arrives, forcing Tanner and Barclay to team up and fend them off together.

programme.desc: Smart gamblers and dubious rules hamper Wyatt's efforts to run a contest.

programme.title: Attack!
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Costa (Jack Palance) is a part of Fragile Fox Company, a National Guard unit sent to a Belgian town in the final stages of World War II. Costa harbors some serious doubts about the leadership abilities of Captain Cooney (Eddie Albert), a coward who only secured his position because of his ties to Lt. Col. Bartlett (Lee Marvin). Cooney's inexperience and his open contempt for Costa threaten the lives of his men as they draw closer to Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: With the Allies poised to retake Paris from the Germans, Col. Franz Von Waldheim (Paul Scofield) conspires to sneak out by train all the art masterpieces looted by the German army. But museum curator Mademoiselle Villard (Suzanne Flon) alerts the French Resistance, and soon railway inspector Paul Labiche (Burt Lancaster) is pressed into service. He reroutes the train, and cleverly deceives Von Waldheim by renaming each train station along the way.

programme.title: Anzio
programme.desc: After Allied forces invade Anzio, seven Americans become trapped behind German lines and must take shelter with a family.

programme.title: The Dirty Dozen
programme.desc: As D-Day approaches, Colonel Breed hands the roguish Major Reisman an important assignment: He must train a team of soldiers to parachute across enemy lines and assassinate German personnel at a French château. The soldiers, recruited from murderers, rapists and criminals on death row, are promised commuted sentences. In spite of their history, the 12 men prove a spirited and courageous unit. Led by Major Reisman, they will exact revenge.

programme.title: The Longest Day
programme.desc: In 1944, the U.S. Army and Allied forces send a huge force to invade Normandy. With much effort and loss of life, the troops make it off the beach and travel deep into French territory.

programme.title: Hellcats of the Navy
programme.desc: Captain Casey Abbott (Ronald Reagan) commands an American submarine in the Pacific during World War II. When a perilous mission to retrieve a new Japanese mine for study goes awry, he's forced to abandon a likable combat diver, Wes Barton (Harry Lauter). Abbott's orders to leave a man behind appear to be justified, but his second in command, Don Landon (Arthur Franz), believes he had ulterior motives: Barton had been competing for the attention of his love interest, Helen (Nancy Davis).

programme.title: Now, Voyager
programme.desc: Boston heiress Charlotte Vale (Bette Davis) is a neurotic mess, largely because of her domineering mother (Gladys Cooper). But after a stint in a sanatorium where she receives the attention of Dr. Asquith (Claude Rains), Charlotte comes out of her shell and elects to go on a cruise. Aboard ship, she meets Jerry (Paul Henreid) and falls in love, despite his being married. They enjoy a brief tryst in Rio before returning to the States, where Charlotte struggles to forget him and find happiness.

programme.title: I Remember Mama
programme.desc: Norwegian immigrant Marta Hanson (Irene Dunne) keeps a firm but loving hand on her household of four children, a devoted husband (Philip Dorn) and a highly-educated lodger (Cedric Hardwicke) who reads Charles Dickens to the family every evening. Through financial crises, illnesses and the small triumphs of everyday life, Marta maintains her optimism and sense of humor, traits she passes on to her aspiring-author daughter, Katrin (Barbara Bel Geddes).

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: The endearing saga of the March sisters -- Meg (Frances Dee), Jo (Katharine Hepburn), Amy and Beth -- who come of age in New England during the Civil War, is based on the classic Louisa May Alcott novel. With Mr. March away fighting for the Union cause, the girls and their beloved mother, Marmee (Spring Byington), manage to keep their spirits up through dire economic and emotional crises, until Jo's literary aspirations and Meg's romance with a teacher threaten to pull the sisters apart.

programme.title: Now, Voyager

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri
programme.desc: Naval Reservist pilot Lt. Harry Brubaker (William Holden) is stationed on an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan during the Korean War. Although suffering from battle fatigue and longing to return to civilian life with his wife, Nancy (Grace Kelly), he agrees to fly a dangerous bombing mission over North Korea, with the support of his faithful rescue crew, Forney (Mickey Rooney) and Gamidge (Earl Holliman), and his sympathetic commanding officer, Commander Lee (Charles McGraw).

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: One night in 1944 in a German POW camp housing American airmen, two prisoners try to escape the compound and are quickly discovered and shot dead. Among the remaining men, suspicion grows that one of their own is a spy for the Germans. All eyes fall on Sgt. Sefton who everybody knows frequently makes exchanges with German guards for small luxuries. To protect himself from a mob of his enraged fellow inmates, Sgt. Sefton resolves to find the true traitor within their midst.

programme.title: Little Women

programme.title: Blazing the Western Trail
programme.desc: Noble cowboy the Durango Kid (Charles Starrett) gets snared in a vicious feud between two warring stagecoach operations. One of the two has been recently willed to spitfire Mary Halliday (Carole Mathews), whose father the Kid suspects was murdered by a business rival. With the help of his trusted friends Tex Harding (Tex Harding) and Cannonball (Dub Taylor), the Kid hopes to uncover the truth while hiding the investigation from the strident Miss Halliday.

programme.title: Jingle All the Way
programme.desc: (1996) Brian Levant's festive all-action comedy. Arnold Schwarzenegger is on a mission to get his son (Jake Lloyd) the must-have Christmas toy, Turbo Man. But it's sold out everywhere...

programme.title: Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: (2010) Family fantasy comedy. Dwayne Johnson stars as a tough ice hockey player who is transformed into a real-life fairy as punishment for telling a child that tooth fairies don't exist.

programme.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: (2019) Touching comedy-drama. An ageing golden retriever (voiced by Kevin Costner) tells the story of his life with his best pal, a budding Formula 1 driver.

programme.title: Sink the Bismarck!
programme.desc: (1960) Second World War drama. Kenneth More stars as the British captain charged with finding and destroying the Bismarck, Germany's largest battleship. Directed by Lewis Gilbert.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: (2016) Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: Peppermint
programme.desc: (2018) Revenge thriller with Jennifer Garner. A mum turns vigilante on a quest for justice when her husband and daughter are murdered by a drug cartel.

programme.title: The 355
programme.desc: (2022) Action spy caper with Jessica Chastain, Diane Kruger and Penélope Cruz. A global alliance of elite operatives team up to kick ass and retrieve some stolen world-ending tech.

programme.title: Rodeo
